design_rationale: The schema combines continuous guidance for approach (center, speed, orientation) with a large sparse bonus for a successful soft landing on both legs. Control penalties discourage wasteful thrust. No crash penalty is included at this stage to keep the initial schema simple and avoid reliance on unobserved terminal states.
assumptions: The landing pad center corresponds to x=0.
Both leg contacts imply stable ground contact and termination.
The environment terminates shortly after both legs contact, so a one-time event is sufficient.
risk_notes: Dense rewards may incentivize hovering; weight scaling ensures terminal bonus outweighs accumulated dense rewards over a typical episode.
Crash states are not explicitly penalized; adding a safety component later may be required.
